   "reasoning": "Honestly, the system is prioritizing the worst-off students at the expense of the ones who need it most - the ones who actually care and work hard. I think throwing more money at scholarships won't change the fact that my peers are stuck in an unchallenging environment, and stricter attendance won't help us learn. Better teachers, however, and transparency about which schools are doing better, that's what I think matters.",
